response.justification: Candidate has deep fullstack experience well beyond the junior/mid level the role targets, including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS exposure from Optilyz and re:cinq. They are based in Berlin which matches the on-site requirement, and have a track record of clean architecture, testing, and learning across diverse stacks. Main concern is overqualification and potential salary/seniority mismatch for an entry-level position, plus only basic German and no explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience (MongoDB/MySQL instead).
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS experience from recent senior roles
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and AI/LLM tooling work
concerns: Significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role — likely seniority/salary mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (relational DB exposure is MySQL/SQL, primary NoSQL is MongoDB)
Only basic German, which may matter in a renewable-energy/construction domain with on-site presence
